recommendations.title: Annie Hall
recommendations.overview: New York comedian Alvy Singer falls in love with the ditsy Annie Hall.

recommendations.title: A Rainy Day in New York
recommendations.overview: Two young people arrive in New York to spend a weekend, but once they arrive they're met with bad weather and a series of adventures.

recommendations.title: Manhattan
recommendations.overview: Manhattan explores how the life of a middle-aged television writer dating a teenage girl is further complicated when he falls in love with his best friend's mistress.

recommendations.title: Husbands and Wives
recommendations.overview: When their best friends announce that they're separating, a professor and his wife discover the faults in their own marriage.

recommendations.title: Hannah and Her Sisters
recommendations.overview: Between two Thanksgivings, Hannah's husband falls in love with her sister Lee, while her hypochondriac ex-husband rekindles his relationship with her sister Holly.

recommendations.title: Midnight in Paris
recommendations.overview: While on a trip to Paris with his fiancée's family, a nostalgic screenwriter finds himself mysteriously going back to the 1920s every day at midnight.

recommendations.title: Everyone Says I Love You
recommendations.overview: A New York girl sets her father up with a beautiful woman in a shaky marriage while her half sister gets engaged.

recommendations.title: Stardust Memories
recommendations.overview: While attending a retrospect of his work, a filmmaker recalls his life and his loves: the inspirations for his films.

recommendations.title: Vicky Cristina Barcelona
recommendations.overview: Two girlfriends on a summer holiday in Spain become enamored with the same painter, unaware that his ex-wife, with whom he has a tempestuous relationship, is about to re-enter the picture.

recommendations.title: Scoop
recommendations.overview: An American journalism student in London scoops a big story, and begins an affair with an aristocrat as the incident unfurls.
